mapper.select: select id, parent_id, menu_code, menu_name, module_code, path, sort_no from sys_menu order by coalesce(sort_no, 0), id
select id, rule_code, biz_type, prefix, date_pattern, serial_length, reset_cycle, status from sys_sequence_rule where rule_code = #{ruleCode} and coalesce(status, '启用') <> '停用'
select current_value from sys_sequence_value where rule_id = #{ruleId} and period_key = #{periodKey}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_sequence_value(id, rule_id, period_key, current_value) values(#{id}, #{ruleId}, #{periodKey}, #{currentValue})
mapper.update: update sys_sequence_value set current_value = #{currentValue} where rule_id = #{ruleId} and period_key = #{periodKey}
mapper.insert: insert into sys_operation_log(id, biz_type, biz_id, action, request_body, operator_id, operated_at, result, error_message) values(#{id}, #{dto.bizType}, #{dto.bizId}, #{dto.action}, #{dto.requestBody}, #{dto.operatorId}, now(), #{dto.result}, #{dto.errorMessage})
mapper.select: select id, parent_id, org_code, org_name, org_type, status from md_org where coalesce(status, '启用') not in ('停用', 'DISABLED') order by org_code, id
select id, workshop_code, workshop_name, org_id, status from md_workshop where coalesce(status, '启用') not in ('停用', 'DISABLED') and org_id = #{orgId} order by workshop_code, id
select id, team_code, team_name, workshop_id, leader_id, status from md_team where coalesce(status, '启用') not in ('停用', 'DISABLED') and workshop_id = #{workshopId} order by team_code, id
